abilities.name: Demise (Mind Games)
abilities.text: When this model is killed, it may drain a (soulstone) to be placed into base contact with a friendly Kunoichi in play. If it does so, it heals 8. Then, kill the Kunoichi without infusing a (soulstone).

abilities.name: Incriminating Evidence
abilities.text: When an enemy Scheme marker is made within 8" of this model, the model that made the marker gains an Entranced token.

abilities.name: Stealth
abilities.text: While more than 6" away from this model, enemy models cannot target it and ignore it when drawing LoS.

actions.name: Finishing Strike
actions.costs_and_restrictions: If there are no different enemy models within 2" of the target, damage from this action is irreducible.

triggers.name: Critical Strike
triggers.text: When resolving, this action deals +1 damage to the target.

triggers.name: Inspiration
triggers.text: This model gains a Focused token.

actions.name: Gather Intel
actions.costs_and_restrictions: Ally only. Move the target up to 5" in any direction. Then, enemy models within (r)2" of the target must pass a TN 13 Wp duel or gain an Entranced token.

triggers.name: Veiled Intentions
triggers.text: Place this model anywhere within 6". Then, this model may declare a (melee) action.

triggers.name: Draw Out Secrets
triggers.text: Make a Scheme marker in base contact with the target.

actions.name: Hidden Ledger
actions.costs_and_restrictions: Once per activation. Reveal the top five cards of the opposing player's fate deck and discard all non-joker cards of any one suit, placing the rest of the cards back in any order.

triggers.name: Queen's Gambit
triggers.text: Up to two allies in LoS may move up to 3".
